title: Premium Access
seoTitle: Game of Darts Premium Access | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to unlock premium Game of Darts features with Pro, DartBot unlock, or a 48-hour access pass.
summary: Premium access is available through Pro, DartBot, or a 48-hour pass. BarkinMad Coins is not yet the main access method.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts premium access image

sections.heading: Premium Access
paragraphs: Game of Darts offers several ways to unlock additional features. Whether you choose the full Pro upgrade, DartBot, or a temporary 48-hour pass, premium access is designed to enhance your experience while keeping the core game available to everyone.
Premium options remove gameplay limitations, unlock additional features and provide the best way to enjoy the complete Game of Darts experience.

sections.heading: Available Upgrades
paragraphs: The app currently supports three premium options depending on how you want to play.
bullets: Pro Version – Permanently unlocks premium features.
DartBot – Unlocks the AI practice opponent.
48 Hour Pass – Temporary access to premium features for 48 hours.

sections.heading: Premium Benefits
paragraphs: Premium access provides a smoother playing experience with fewer interruptions while unlocking advanced features throughout the app.
bullets: Reduce or remove advertisements depending on your purchase.
Support continued development of Game of Darts.

sections.heading: Supporting BarkinMad Studios
paragraphs: Purchasing premium content directly supports the continued development of Game of Darts. Every purchase helps fund new game modes, additional features, bug fixes and future updates.
If premium isn't for you, simply playing the free version and watching the optional advertisements also helps support future development.

images.alt: Artwork for Game of Darts premium access
images.caption: Premium access artwork
